# Kun (Ryan) Ni

> Senior Data Scientist and Tech Lead with over 14 years of experience in the ICT industry. Expert in multi-agent systems, LLM applications, and MLOps on distributed compute infrastructure.

## About

- Location: Montreal, Quebec, Canada
- Current Role: Senior Data Scientist at Ericsson Canada
- Education: Masters in Machine Learning (Mila / Université De Montréal)
- Specialization: Multi-agent systems, LangGraph, vLLM, LLMOps, MLOps

- [CV](/cv/)

## Blog Posts

- [Building Multi-Agent Systems with LangGraph](/blog/building-multi-agent-systems/): An introduction to building production-grade multi-agent systems using LangGraph.

## Skills

- AI & Machine Learning: LangGraph, vLLM, AWS Bedrock, LLMOps, MLOps, Time Series Analysis, Multi-Agent Systems, NLP
- Languages & Frameworks: Python, C/C++, Java, Linux Shell, MySQL
- Cloud & Infrastructure: Kubernetes, Docker, Kubeflow, CI/CD, NFV, SDN
- Leadership: Team Leadership, Project Coordination, Coaching & Mentoring, Cross-functional Collaboration

## Publications

- [Learning Improvised Chatbots from Adversarial Modifications of Natural Language Feedback](https://arxiv.org/abs/2010.07261) — Findings of EMNLP 2020
